priority_ranking.title: Direction-specific weight scaling
priority_ranking.description: Use buy_accuracy/sell_accuracy as weight in _weighted_consensus instead of overall accuracy. When qwen3 votes SELL, weight it at 74.3%; when BUY, weight at 30.4%. Currently both get ~60%.
priority_ranking.implementation: ~5-line change in signal_engine.py _weighted_consensus at line 838. Change: weight = dir_acc if dir_n >= 20 else (acc if samples >= 20 else 0.5)
priority_ranking.status: READY — tonight's per-ticker directional accuracy work provides the data foundation

priority_ranking.title: MSTR-BTC proxy signal inheritance
priority_ranking.description: MSTR has 1.31-1.41 beta to BTC, >0.80 daily correlation. Import BTC consensus into MSTR with beta scaling. Add mNAV premium tracking (>2.0 = SELL bias, <1.3 = BUY bias).
priority_ranking.implementation: New mstr_btc_proxy.py module (~150 lines). Needs mNAV data.

priority_ranking.title: XAG cross-asset feature enrichment
priority_ranking.description: Add DXY as explicit feature (strongest macro driver of silver), copper as leading indicator (1-2 day lead), real yields inversion threshold. Paper: tree-based classifiers achieve 85-90% directional accuracy at 20-day horizons for gold/silver.
sources: MDPI: Predicting Gold and Silver Direction Using Tree-Based Classifiers
MDPI: Silver Price Forecasting Using XGBoost

priority_ranking.title: IC-based signal weighting
priority_ranking.description: Replace accuracy (hit rate) with Information Coefficient (Spearman rank correlation of predicted vs actual returns). IC captures both direction AND magnitude. Good ICs are 0.02-0.08; above 0.15 suggests overfitting.
priority_ranking.implementation: New compute_rolling_ic() in accuracy_stats.py. Convert votes to numerical predictions: predicted_return = confidence * sign(vote). Rolling 30-day Spearman correlation.

priority_ranking.title: HMM regime detection
priority_ranking.description: Replace deterministic detect_regime() with probabilistic 3-4 state Gaussian HMM. Output regime probability vector instead of binary label. Use hmmlearn.GaussianHMM, rolling 252d window per instrument.

priority_ranking.title: Dynamic correlation groups
priority_ranking.description: Replace static _STATIC_CORRELATION_GROUPS with hierarchical clustering on 32x32 signal vote agreement matrix. Current groups may be stale.

priority_ranking.title: Adaptive position sizing (Half-Kelly + ATR)
priority_ranking.description: Fractional Kelly (25-50%) + volatility targeting. Regime-conditioned: reduce to 60% in high-vol, increase to 120% in low-vol trending.

priority_ranking.title: Walk-forward validation framework
priority_ranking.description: Replay signal_log.db through consensus engine with different parameter sets. 60d train, 15d test windows. Validate: ACCURACY_GATE, DIRECTIONAL_GATE, REGIME_WEIGHTS, CORRELATION_PENALTY, RECENCY_WEIGHT.

critical_finding.title: Fear & Greed blended accuracy is below gate
critical_finding.detail: 0.7 * 0.259 (recent) + 0.3 * 0.586 (all-time) = 0.357. This is below the 0.45 accuracy gate. Fear & Greed SHOULD already be force-HOLD'd. Verify accuracy cache has been refreshed.
critical_finding.action: Check if fear_greed is actually being gated in live loop. If not, the accuracy cache may be stale or the blending formula is different.

key_papers.title: Predicting Gold and Silver Price Direction Using Tree-Based Classifiers
Combined ML for Stock Selection Based on Dynamic IC Weighting
key_papers.finding: IC-based weighting produces ~4x returns vs single-model

key_papers.title: Statistical Jump Model for Regime Detection
Kelly, VIX, and Hybrid Position Sizing
key_papers.finding: Half-Kelly captures 75% growth with 50% less drawdown
